scripts.format: npm run format --workspace=@deepsel/cms-utils && npm run format --workspace=@deepsel/cms-react && npm run format --workspace=@deepsel/admin
scripts.format:check: npm run format:check --workspace=@deepsel/cms-utils && npm run format:check --workspace=@deepsel/cms-react && npm run format:check --workspace=@deepsel/admin
scripts.build:packages: npm run build --workspace=@deepsel/cms-utils && npm run build --workspace=@deepsel/cms-react
scripts.prepush:admin: npm run test --workspace=@deepsel/admin && npm run build:lib --workspace=@deepsel/admin
